meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve overwhelmed by AI tools (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome overwhelmed by AI tools. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: overwhelmed by AI tools

content.seo_title: Freelancer's Guide: Antigravity Template for AI Scaling
content.seo_description: Stop drowning in AI tool fatigue. Master the Antigravity project template and streamline your workflow with Claude Code in this expert-level tutorial.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates AI tool fatigue by standardizing your architectural foundation. By integrating this scaffold with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate, enforce consistent patterns, and accelerate delivery times by up to 40%, allowing you to focus on high-value logic rather than managing fragmented AI outputs.
content.intro:
The modern freelancer’s desk is a graveyard of half-baked AI experiments and fragmented codebases. You started with the promise of 10x productivity, but you’ve ended up with a cognitive load that kills your flow state. The sheer noise of competing AI agents and unopinionated scaffolding has turned your development process into a chaotic scramble.

But the chaos ends here. We are shifting from 'prompt-and-pray' to a structured, repeatable engineering discipline. By deploying the Antigravity project template, you create a rigid, high-performance container that forces your AI tools to behave, ensuring every line of code you ship meets production-grade standards without the manual overhead.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the root directory structure that enforces separation of concerns and modularity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the Antigravity standard architecture, ensuring strict separation between services, domain logic, and API interfaces.

steps.title: Define Domain Contracts
steps.description: Use the template's built-in schema definitions to prevent AI hallucination regarding your data structures.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate TypeScript interfaces for the core domain entities defined in the project scope, adhering to the Antigravity strict-typing conventions.

steps.title: Inject Business Logic Layers
steps.description: Populate the service layer using the Antigravity pattern to ensure testability and clean dependency injection.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the business logic services, ensuring all external calls are abstracted behind interfaces and error handling is wrapped in the Antigravity standard middleware.

steps.title: Automate Integration Tests
steps.description: Leverage Claude Code to generate verification scripts that validate your implementation against the Antigravity specification.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create unit and integration tests for the newly created service layer, adhering to the Antigravity testing utility patterns.

steps.title: Finalize Production Build
steps.description: Run the optimization script to purge unused dependencies and compile the optimized production-ready bundle.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the project for build optimizations and apply the Antigravity production build configuration.

pro_tips: Always lock your Antigravity version in the config file to prevent upstream template updates from breaking your CI/CD pipelines mid-sprint.
Use Claude Code's 'memory' flag to persist your project-specific coding style preferences across multiple sessions.
Inject a 'style-guide.md' into the root directory that Claude Code reads automatically to enforce your specific naming conventions.
When facing complex refactors, use the Antigravity 'dry-run' command to preview AI changes before applying them to the file tree.
Chain your prompts by using the output of one Claude Code task as the context for the next to maintain logical consistency without manual copy-pasting.
content.next_steps: Once your first Antigravity project is live, integrate a CI/CD pipeline like GitHub Actions to automate the testing phase you defined in Step 4.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your tools and start engineering your future. With this template, you're not just a freelancer; you're a high-velocity product engine. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
